export const HeroTickRingLight = () => (
  <svg className="tk-hero-tick-ring tk-img-light" viewBox="0 0 657 329" width="657" height="329" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <g className="tk-hero-tick-spin">
      <path opacity="0.3" d={TICK_PATH} stroke="black" />
    </g>
  </svg>
);

export const HeroTickRingDark = () => (
  <svg className="tk-hero-tick-ring tk-img-dark" viewBox="0 0 657 329" width="657" height="329" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <g className="tk-hero-tick-spin">
      <path opacity="0.3" d={TICK_PATH} stroke="white" />
    </g>
  </svg>
);
